description: A quality engineer needs to create a quality control point for 'Large Cabinet' that mirrors the existing one for 'Cabinet with Doors'. Duplicate the 'Surface Quality Check - Cabinet with Doors' quality control point and modify the copy to be named 'Surface Quality Check - Large Cabinet' and linked to the 'Large Cabinet' product. Ensure the original quality control point remains unchanged.

metadata.source_name: Surface Quality Check - Cabinet with Doors
